skills.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-cli
skills.description: LP, MILP, and QP (beta) with cuOpt — CLI only (MPS files, cuopt_cli). Use when the user is solving LP, MILP, or QP from MPS via command line.

skills.name: cuopt-routing-api-python
skills.description: Vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP) with cuOpt — Python API only. Use when the user is building or solving routing in Python.

skills.name: cuopt-developer

skills.name: cuopt-install
skills.description: Install cuOpt for Python, C, or server via pip, conda, or Docker; verify the install. For building cuOpt from source, see cuopt-developer.

skills.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-python
skills.description: Solve LP, MILP, QP (beta) with cuOpt Python API — linear/quadratic objectives, integer variables, scheduling, portfolio, least squares.

skills.name: cuopt-server-api-python
skills.description: cuOpt REST server — start server, endpoints, Python/curl client examples. Use when the user is deploying or calling the REST API.

skills.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-formulation
skills.description: LP, MILP, QP — concepts, problem-text parsing, and formulation patterns (parameters, constraints, decisions, objective). Concepts only; no API.

skills.name: cuopt-routing-formulation
skills.description: Vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP) — problem types and data requirements. Domain concepts; no API or interface.

skills.name: cuopt-skill-evolution
skills.description: After solving a non-trivial problem, detect generalizable learnings and propose skill updates. Always active — applies to every interaction.

skills.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-c

skills.name: cuopt-server-common
skills.description: cuOpt REST server — what it does and how requests flow. Domain concepts; no deploy or client code.

skills.name: skill-card-generator

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-recipe-recommender

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-mlm-bridge-training
skills.description: Run Megatron-LM (MLM) and Megatron Bridge training with mock or real data. Covers correlation testing, available recipes, and multi-GPU examples.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-multi-node-slurm

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-activation-recompute
skills.description: Validate and use selective and full activation recompute in Megatron Bridge to reduce GPU memory usage at the cost of extra compute.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-cpu-offloading
skills.description: Validate and use CPU offloading in Megatron Bridge, including layer-level activation offloading and fractional optimizer state offloading with HybridDeviceOptimizer.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-cuda-graphs
skills.description: Validate and use CUDA graph capture in Megatron Bridge, including local full-iteration graphs and Transformer Engine scoped graphs for attention, MLP, and MoE modules.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-expert-parallel-overlap
skills.description: Validate and use MoE expert-parallel communication overlap in Megatron-Bridge, including overlap_moe_expert_parallel_comm, delay_wgrad_compute, and flex dispatcher backends such as DeepEP and HybridEP.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-hierarchical-context-parallel

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-megatron-fsdp

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-memory-tuning
skills.description: Techniques for reducing peak GPU memory in Megatron Bridge — expandable segments, parallelism resizing, activation recompute, CPU offloading constraints, and common OOM fixes.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-comm-overlap
skills.description: MoE expert-parallel communication overlap in Megatron Bridge. Covers dispatch/combine overlap, flex dispatcher backends, and expert wgrad scheduling.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-dispatcher-selection
skills.description: Choose the right MoE token dispatcher (`alltoall`, DeepEP, or HybridEP) for the hardware, EP degree, and optimization stage. Summarizes patterns from DSV3, Qwen3, Qwen3-Next, and VLM bring-up work.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-hardware-configs
skills.description: Representative MoE training playbooks by hardware platform and model family. Summarizes rounded throughput bands, parallelism patterns, and common tuning stacks.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-long-context
skills.description: Long-context MoE training guidance for Megatron Bridge. Covers CP sizing, selective recompute, dispatcher choices, and practical patterns from DSV3, Qwen3, and Qwen3-Next long-context experiments.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-optimization-workflow
skills.description: Systematic workflow for MoE training optimization in Megatron Bridge, based on the Megatron-Core MoE paper. Covers the Three Walls framework, parallel folding, recompute strategy, dispatcher choice, and CUDA-graph bring-up.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-moe-vlm-training
skills.description: Practical guidance for training MoE VLMs in Megatron Bridge. Compares FSDP and 3D-parallel approaches, using rounded lessons from Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Next, and other multimodal experiments.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-parallelism-strategies
skills.description: Operational guide for choosing and combining parallelism strategies in Megatron Bridge, including sizing rules, hardware topology mapping, and combined parallelism configuration.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-sequence-packing
skills.description: Validate and use packed sequences and long-context training in Megatron-Bridge, distinguishing offline packed SFT for LLMs from in-batch packing for VLMs, and applying the right CP constraints.

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-perf-tp-dp-comm-overlap

skills.name: nemo-mbridge-resiliency

skills.name: dynamo-troubleshoot
